action.reasoning: Observation: Latest run regressed to 0.2034 test AP (val~0.222) vs best 0.219 from iter23; train.py truncated in workspace (no jsonl/metrics curves since iter8); larger models overfit. Analysis: Complete code + seeds + grad_clip + lower lr=2e-4 + dropout=0.05 + patience=30 + 150 epochs + per-epoch jsonl logging (epoch/loss/val_ap/lr) will stabilize and improve generalization on imbalanced tasks (masked BCE/pos_weight/scheduler already solid). FP r2+r3 cache works; PyG still segfaults. Decision: Update all files for consistency (model defaults dropout=0.05, full non-truncated train.py with explicit params/logging/clip/150 epochs, predict matching), train then submit_eval on best.pt to recover/exceed best AP.
